faq001:
On the Journal login page https://journal.top-academy.ru/, click on the "Forgot password" button. On the page that opens, enter your email address and click on the "Send" button. After that, you will receive an email with your username and password.
If you have not received the mail, please contact the study department.
faq002:
Topgems are an indicator of your academic performance, they are awarded for academic achievements.

You can get topgems for:

  • 1) Home works, lab works
  • 2) Work in class
  • 3) Check and final tests
  • 4) Review works
  • 5) Exam and term paper

For in-time (not overdue) works the topgems are given as follows:

  • +5 for grade 12
  • +4 for grade 11
  • +3 for grade 10
  • +2 for grade 9
  • +1 for grade 8
  • +1 for overdue home or lab work
  • Grades below 7 do not result in topgems

Additionally, top gems can be earned

  • +1 - for laboratory work
  • +1 - for completed overdue homework
    • +5 - for the work posted in the Portfolio section

For exam and term paper the number of topgems is multiplied by х3.

Thus, if the grade is from 12 to 8, you can get:

  • 5 х 3 = 15
  • 4 х 3 = 12
  • 3 х 3 = 9
  • 2 х 3 = 6
  • 1 х 3 = 3
faq002_school:
Topgems are an indicator of your academic performance, they are awarded for success in your studies.

You can earn topgems for:

  • 1) Submitting homework and lab work
  • 2) Working in class
  • 3) Submitting tests and final tests
  • 4) Test work
  • 5) Submitting an exam and final work

For open (not overdue) assignments, topgems are awarded according to the following scheme:

  • +5 - for a grade of 5
  • +3 - for a grade of 4

You can also earn topgems

  • +1 - for lab work

For final work:

  • +15 - for grade 5
  • +9 - for grade 4
  • +9 - for grade 3
faq003:
Topcoins are an indicator of your activity at the Academy, they are awarded for:

  • 1) Class attendance
  • 2) Timely delivery of a homework or lab
  • 3) Teacher’s reward for classwork
  • 4) 5, 10, 20 continuous attendances (without absences)
  • 5) 5, 10, 20 continuous attendances without being late
  • 6) Participation in a contest
  • 7) Posting a feedback in official Academy groups in social media. Links to official groups in social media to leave a feedback can be checked with the head teacher or at the Academy website.
  • 8) Refer a friend to study at TOP Computer Academy
  • 9) Full profile info in Journal: contact info, phone numbers, links to social media
  • 10) Attendance in a T-shirt with the TOP logo
  • 11) Participation in the questionnaire

Topcoins are awarded as follows:

  • +1 - Timely delivery of a homework or lab. Topcoins are not awarded for overdue works.
  • +1 - class attendance
  • +1 - 5 continuous attendances. A student gets 1 topcoin if she attended classes 5 academic days in a row and did not miss one.
    After a topcoin is awarded, the attendance counter is reset to zero.
  • +2 - 10 continuous attendances; a student gets 2 topcoins and 1 reward if she attended classes 10 academic days in a row and did not miss one.
    After topcoins and a reward are awarded, the attendance counter is reset to zero.
  • +5 - 20 continuous attendances; a student gets 5 topcoins if she attended classes 20 academic days in a row and did not miss one.
    After topcoins are awarded, the attendance counter is reset to zero.
  • +1 - 5 continuous attendances without being late; a student gets 1 topcoin if she attended classes 5 academic days in a row and was not late.
    After a topcoin is awarded, the attendance counter is reset to zero.
  • +2 - 10 continuous attendances without being late; a student gets 2 topcoins and 1 reward if she attended classes 10 academic days in a row and was not late.
    After topcoins and a reward are awarded, the attendance counter is reset to zero.
  • +3 - 20 continuous attendances without being late; a student gets 5 topcoins if she attended classes 20 academic days in a row and was not late.
    After topcoins are awarded, the attendance counter is reset to zero.
  • From 1 to 5 - Teacher’s reward for classwork (at teacher’s discretion)
  • +20 - Posting a feedback in the official Academy groups in social media
  • +1 - For the work posted in the Portfolio section (Design students only)
  • +5 - Full profile info in Journal: contact info, phone numbers, links to social media
  • +10 - Attendance in a T-shirt with the TOP logo
  • +10 - Refer a friend to study at TOP Computer Academy
  • +20 - Participation in the questionnaire
  • From 1 to 100 - Participation in a contest (at organizer’s discretion)
faq003_school:
Topcoins are an indicator of your activity at school, they are awarded for:

  • 1) Attending a class
  • 2) Submitting homework or lab work on time
  • 3) Reward from the teacher for work in class
  • 4) Attending school 5, 10, 20 times in a row without missing
    (This award is received once)
  • 5) Attending school 5, 10, 20 times in a row without being late
    (This award is received once)
  • 6) Participating in a competition
  • 7) Posting a review in the school's official groups on social networks. Links to official groups in social networks for writing reviews, please check with the educational process manager or on the academy website.
  • 8) Brought a friend to study at TOP
  • 9) Fully filled out profile in the Journal: contacts, phone numbers, links to social networks
  • 10) Visiting school in a T-shirt with the 'TOP'' logo
  • 11) Participation in the survey

Topcoins are awarded according to the following scheme:

  • +1 - Timely submission of homework or lab work.
  • +1 - for attending a lesson
  • +1 - 5 visits in a row without absences - the student receives 1 topcoin if the student attended classes for 5 school days in a row without absences.
    After receiving the reward, the counter of attended classes without absences is reset.
  • +2 - 10 consecutive visits without absences - the student receives 2 topcoins and 1 reward if the student attended classes without absences for 10 school days in a row.
    After receiving the reward, the counter of attended classes without absences is reset.
  • +5 - 20 consecutive visits without absences - the student receives 5 topcoins if the student attended classes without absences for 20 school days in a row.
    After receiving the reward, the counter of attended classes without absences is reset.
  • +1 - 5 consecutive visits without being late - the student receives 1 topcoin if the student attended classes without being late for 5 school days in a row.
    After receiving the reward, the counter of attended classes without being late is reset.
  • +2 - 10 consecutive visits without being late - the student receives 2 Topcoins and 1 reward if the student attended classes without being late for 10 school days in a row.
    After receiving the reward, the counter of attended classes without being late is reset.
  • +3 - 20 consecutive attendances without being late - the student receives 5 Topcoins if the student attended classes without being late for 20 school days in a row.
    After receiving the reward, the counter of attended classes without being late is reset.
  • From 1 to 5 - Reward from the teacher for work in the lesson (at the discretion of the teacher)
  • +20 - Publication of reviews in the official school groups on social networks
  • +1 - Attending school in a T-shirt with the 'TOP' logo
  • +5 - Fully filled out profile in the Journal: contacts, phone numbers, links to social networks. networks
  • +10 - Brought a friend to study at 'TOP'
  • +20 - For participating in the survey
  • From 1 to 100 - Participation in the competition (at the discretion of the organizer)

faq005: Place in the group and class is formed bythe sum of earned topgems and topcoins.
faq006:
If you are not happy with the grade for homework or laboratory work, you can retake it. To do this, click on the "Request for retake" button.

For retaking homework and laboratory work you will get -2 topgems removed. New topgems in case of an increase in the score are not provided
faq007:
The level is a numerical designation next to student's profile photo. It is a reflection of the total number of accumulated Topgems.

There are 5 levels as followed:

  • 1 – 0-100 points
  • 2 – 100-250 points
  • 3 – 250-500 points
  • 4 – 500-1000 points
  • 5 – 1000-2000 points
faq008: The GPA is calculated on the sum of all grades for the entire course of study, regardless of group transfers. Types of grades that the student does not have (worth 0) are not taken into account in the ranking.
faq009: In the "Settings" section, you can fill in or change your profile data: photo, phone number, links to social networks. It is also possible to change the password. To do this, you need to enter the existing password and then enter the new password twice
faq01: How do I access/restore access to Journal?
faq010: Changes in personal data, except for password, are moderated by the teaching department. After confirming the information by the education manager, you can make changes again.
faq011:
If you're experiencing a login issue in Journal, it could be due to a few main reasons:

  • Incorrect login or password:
    Make sure you are entering the correct user data. Check your keyboard layout and make sure that Caps Lock is turned off. If you are sure that you are entering the correct user data, but you still can’t log in, you may need to reset your password or contact the study department for assistance.
  • Using the wrong link:
    Check that you are using the correct login link https://journal.top-academy.ru/login/index

    If none of the above solutions worked, we recommend that you contact the study department for additional help and clarification of this issue.
faq012: You can find information on holidays in your curriculum or contact the study department of your branch.
faq013:
If you are facing learning difficulties and you would like to study more, there are two options:

  1. Sign up for additional individual paid classes, where the teacher will help you cope with difficult topics at your request.
  2. You can sign up for a group free class where, with a general flow of students, the teacher will be able to answer the student's questions.
faq014: To connect to the online lesson, we recommend downloading the Microsoft Teams app to your PC or mobile device and logging in with your account. You can download Microsoft Teams to your device using the following link: Download Microsoft Teams for desktop or mobile
faq015:
On average, the teacher has 4 days to check homework.

Example: If you submitted your homework on 29/01/2024, and today is 02/02/2024 - the deadline for checking the homework has passed, then we recommend contacting the study department, through the "Signals" section in the Journal.
faq016: Information on academic debts can be found in the section "Grades", in the section "Failed exams"
faq017: To resolve this issue, please contact the study department of your branch directly.
faq018: To get acquainted with the progress in learning, you need to go to the student's personal account, in the "Academic Performance" section
faq019: To get acquainted with the training schedule, you need to go to the student's personal account, in the "Schedule" section.
faq020:
Class attendance is noted by the teacher within the first 15 minutes from the beginning of the lesson. If the student is present at the lesson, the teacher puts a corresponding mark in the electronic attendance log.

If a student arrives at class later than the specified time, the teacher marks him as late. This is important as tardiness can affect a student's overall attendance grade and academic performance.
faq021: Transfer to another group is considered individually, we recommend that you contact the study department of your branch.
faq022:
After the class ends, you will see a pop-up window where you can:

  1. Rate the teacher's work and give a grade (⭐️)
  2. Indicate how the class went using buttons and tags
  3. Add a text comment to the grade

Grades are anonymous and not provided to teachers.
faq023:
The following payment methods are currently available:

  • Online payment through your bank's app.
  • Payment by invoice through your bank branch.
faq024: You can find the invoice in the "Payment" section.
faq025: Details for paying for tuition can be found in the "Payment" section.
faq026: Information about the payment schedule can be found in the "Payment" section.
faq027: The QR code for payment can be found on the last page of your contract. When paying, do not forget to indicate your contract number in the reference of payment.
faq028: To change the payment date, you must contact the study department to fill out an application. Please note that according to our payment terms, you can change the payment date by a maximum of 14 days and only if there is no current debt balance.
faq029: If more than 3 days have passed since the date of payment, this may be due to the processing of payments by banks. Check the details to which the payment was made and the reference of the payment. If everything is done correctly and more than 3 days have passed from the date of payment, contact the study department to solve this issue.
faq030:
To receive documents about training, go to the "Requests" section and click on the "Get help" button.

The term for the execution of the certificate is up to 3 calendar days.
faq031: You can purchase products from the Market for the accumulated Topcoins and Topgems (this will not affect your rating, but will allow you to get a well-deserved reward).
faq032: You can contact the study department of your branch and the staff will provide the purchased goods.
faq033:
Topcoins are an indicator of your activity in the academy, they are awarded for:

  • 1) Attending a Class
  • 2) Timely delivery of homework or laboratory work
  • 3) Encouragement from the teacher for work during the lesson
  • 4) Visiting the academy 5, 10, 20 times in a row without skipping
    (Receiving this award is a one-time event)
  • 5) Visiting the academy 5, 10, 20 times in a row without delays
    (Receiving this award is a one-time event)
  • 6) Participation in competitions
  • 7) Publication of a review in official social networks groups of the academy. For links to official social networks groups, ask the manager of the branch or on the academy's website.
  • 8) Bring a friend to study at NOVA IT Academy
  • 9) A fully completed profile in the Journal: contacts, phone numbers, links to social networks.
  • 10) Visit to the academy wearing a T-shirt with the "NOVA" logo
  • 11) Participation in a survey

Topcoins are granted according to the scheme:

  • +1 - Timely submission of homework or laboratory work. Topcoin is not awarded for an overdue task.
  • +1 - For attending the lesson
  • +1 - 5 consecutive visits without skipping - the student receives 1 Topcoin if the student attended classes without missing 5 consecutive academic days.
    After receiving the reward, the counter of classes attended without skipping is reset to zero.
  • +2 - 10 consecutive visits without skipping - the student receives 2 Topcoins and 1 reward if the student attends classes without missing 10 consecutive school days.
    After receiving the reward, the counter of classes attended without skipping is reset to zero.
  • +5 - 20 consecutive visits without absences - the student receives 5 Topcoins in case the student attended classes without missing 20 consecutive academic days.
    After receiving the reward, the counter of classes attended without skipping is reset to zero.
  • +1 - 5 consecutive visits without delays - the student receives 1 Topcoin if the student attended classes without being late for 5 consecutive academic days.
    After receiving the reward, the counter of classes attended without delay is reset to zero.
  • +2 - 10 consecutive visits without delays - the student receives 2 Topcoins and 1 reward if the student attended classes on time for 10 consecutive academic days.
    After receiving the reward, the counter of classes attended without delay is reset to zero.
  • +3 - 20 consecutive visits without delays - the student receives 5 Topcoins if the student attended classes without delays for 20 consecutive academic days.
    After receiving the reward, the counter of classes attended without delay is reset to zero.
  • From 1 to 5 - Encouragement from the teacher for work during the lesson (at the discretion of the teacher)
  • +20 - Publication of a review in the official social networks groups of the academy.
  • +1 - for placing the work in the "Portfolio" (only for students who are studying in the field of design)
  • +1 - Visit to the academy in a T-shirt with the "NOVA" logo
  • +5 - A fully completed profile in the Journal: contacts, phone numbers, links to social networks
  • +10 - Brought a friend to study at "NOVA IT Academy"
  • +20 - For participating in a poll or survey
  • From 1 to 100 - Participation in a competition (at the discretion of the organizer)
faq034: If you participated in the competition held by the Academy, came to the class in a NOVA T-shirt or brought a friend, then to reclaim your reward, contact the study department of your branch.
faq035: You can contact the administration from the "Administration" section.
faq036: You can leave feedback on several platforms: Google Maps, Facebook, Instagram...Take a screenshot of the published review, and send it to the study department through your personal Journal in the "Awards" section.

features_testing01: Each question can have one or several answers in a test.                 If you have answered all questions and you are absolutely sure about your answers, press Complete the Test.                 You can be limited in time. If the test is limited in time and you have pressed Complete the Test, the test will be completed automatically and only those questions will be counted which you were managed to answer.                 The amount of attempts can be limited. If you started the test, it is counted as one attempt even if you press Complete the Test.                 You can answer the questions not in the regular order: skip a more complicated question to go back to it a bit later. After you select answers, press Reply.                 There can be waiting time inbetween attempts.                 There can be more questions than you need to answer to in the test. In this case, questions are selected randomly from the general list of tests.

type_of_testing: Tests are divided into two types
type_of_testing01:
Practice - these tests are not graded. After completing a test, you can see correct answers (green), incorrect answers (red), and correct but not marked answers (orange). You can take those tests whenever and wherever you want. These tests are for self-study.

Tests Tests are graded after successful completion. In case of successful completion of a test, you get $. A successfully completed test is a test with more than 60% of correct answers. At the end of the test, you won't see correct or wrong answers.

PS: If you fail the test, don't despair. Review the educational materials and try it again.

vacancy_message:
In order to get access to the section Vacancies from our partners, the student has to fulfill the following conditions:
1. GPA in all subjects – 8.00 or higher;
2. Average attendance of all classes – above 65.00%;
3. Study full-time or part-time for 4 full semesters;
4. ECO – 4 years;
5. Specialization courses – next day after the study is finished, but before writing term paper.
VPN_MESSAGE: Dear attendees! If you cannot access additional materials, you can use a Chrome VPN extension:
why_need_testing01: Lots of companies test their applicants before or instead of an interview. These tests contain about 10 questions and a variety of answers to them. If you take tests from time to time, you will be prepared for such scenarios. When taking tests, pay attention to the questions you can’t give a precise answer. It will serve you as a red light indicating that you did not fully understand, did not remember, or did not know this.
